description: Inter-session/inter-agent/inter-project messaging plugin for Agent Zero. Phase 2 complete: live delivery with SessionRegistry, MessageBus direct injection + async fallback, list_sessions.
notes: Phase 1: send/check/reply, JSONL mailbox, 5 tests. Phase 2: SessionRegistry (in-memory, stale detection), MessageBus (direct injection via AgentContext.communicate + mailbox fallback), list_sessions in MessengerTool, 7 tests passing.
